title: Stainless Steel Pet Bowl with Embossed Paw Prints – Non-Slip Base | Durable Feeding Dish for Dogs & Cats | Hygienic, Rust-Free & Easy to Clean | Ideal for Food & Water
features: High-quality stainless steel – rust-resistant and built to last
Embossed paw prints – stylish and pet-themed design
Non-slip rubber base – prevents sliding and tipping
Easy to clean – dishwasher safe and hygienic
Versatile use – perfect for food or water, at home or on the go
description: Product description 🐾 Stylish & Functional Pet Bowl Elevate your pet’s mealtime with our premium stainless steel bowl featuring embossed paw prints. Designed for both dogs and cats, this bowl combines durability, hygiene, and charm in one sleek package. 💎 Premium Stainless Steel Build Crafted from high-grade stainless steel, this bowl resists rust, corrosion, and scratches. Its reflective finish adds a modern touch to any feeding station while ensuring long-lasting use. 🧼 Hygienic & Easy to Clean The smooth surface prevents food buildup and makes cleaning effortless. Simply rinse or toss it in the dishwasher for a quick refresh—perfect for busy pet owners. 🐶 Non-Slip Rubber Base Equipped with a sturdy rubber ring, the bowl stays in place during feeding, reducing spills and mess. Ideal for energetic pets who love to dig into their meals. 🎨 Embossed Paw Print Design Decorative paw prints on the inner and outer surfaces add a playful, pet-friendly vibe. It’s not just a bowl—it’s a statement of love for your furry companion. 📏 Perfect Size for Daily Use Suitable for dry food, wet food, or water. Ideal for small to medium-sized dogs and cats. Lightweight yet stable, making it great for home or travel. Directions Indoor & Outdoor
